title: usecase.Migrate (schema_version upgrades)
acceptance_criteria: Detects items with schema_version < current; applies registered upgraders.
Auto-invoked when task list/task show encounters an old item.

Items with schema_version > current are reported in skipped[] with reason="binary too old" — they are NOT migrated, NOT downgraded, and NOT silently dropped. This is the symmetric counterpart to the forward-version guard in TTR-E01-S05 and prevents a newer-binary write from poisoning an older-binary workspace.
Returns { migrated: [{ id, from_version, to_version }], skipped: [{ id, current_version, binary_supports, reason }] }.
